body:
## Summary
- restore separate mobile controls and desktop toolbar layout for the left sidebar
- keep the GitHub repo icon in the title row with the mobile dark-mode control at the top
- preserve the desktop search/dark-mode/reader-mode flex row from the previous layout

## Validation
- npm run check
- npm run build with Giscus env vars
